title: lithocarpus glaucus
intro: Lithocarpus glaucus, also known as the Taiwan nut or Taiwan white oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to Taiwan and parts of southern China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Lithocarpus glaucus is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus glaucus may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
